title: Spanish-Style Stir-Fried Potatoes
description: A fusion of Spanish and Chinese flavors, this dish combines crispy potatoes with savory mellow sausage.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mellow sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the cooked sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the patatas bravas sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil, and stir to combine.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the potatoes are coated in the sauce.
